case_title: CITY COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SHERIFF'S DEPT. VS BECERRIL, SERGIO

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-02-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-21-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR FURTHER HEARING. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE PHOTOS OF PROPERTY DAMAGE; SPANISH INTERPRETER WILL BE PROVIDED TO DEFENDANT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,339.42 FILED BY CITY  COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SHERIFF'S DEPT. AS TO DEFENDANT BECERRIL, SERGIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY  COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SHERIFF'S DEPT. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BECERRIL, SERGIO $2,339.42 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,339.42, IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO MAKE PAYMENTS AS AGREED, PLAINTIFF CCSF MAY REQUEST ACCELARATION OF BALANCE DUE, INCLUDING INTEREST OF THE OUTSTANDING BALANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL TO SERGIO BECERRIL RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.
